title: limeum viscosum var. glomeratum
intro: Limeum viscosum var. glomeratum, also known as sticky limeum, is a plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent, and has been employed to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Limeum viscosum var. glomeratum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a valuable herbal remedy for people suffering from fluid retention and other related health issues. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and infusions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
